author: Colton
description: Provision one lifetime 24-hour Gold Panel M3U trial per Discord user, enforce a global concurrent trial limit, and disable expired provider accounts automatically.
install_msg: Load with `[p]load goldtrial`, configure the Gold Panel API key, enable the cog's slash commands, then run `/trialadmin setup`.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores a pseudonymous lifetime eligibility marker, trial timestamps, provider user ID, status, and temporary active-trial credentials. Active credentials are removed when a trial expires or is revoked. The lifetime eligibility marker is retained to enforce one trial per Discord user.
